title: Agent delegation — do NOT do the work yourself

files.content: the plan is to write v2

prompt: There is a file `{workspace}/plan.md`. DO NOT read it yourself. Instead, delegate the reading to a sub-agent named `researcher` via the Agent tool, with a prompt like 'read {workspace}/plan.md and return its single line'. Emit exactly one tool_use (the Agent delegation) and no Read calls.
